summary: Iteration 18 — verified stop-button bug fix + FHD default resolution + '- Chitoos Media' default subtitle + AI-enhance no-subtitle-overwrite. All 18 backend pytest tests pass. Frontend UI verified end-to-end via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: VideoRecorderModal.jsx is 736 lines — consider splitting (mixer, VFX presets, canvas render loop) into separate hooks/components for maintainability.
stopRecording restores sampler.volume.value = 0 hardcoded — if the app ever supports a user-configurable master volume, save/restore the previous value instead of assuming 0dB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter18 verified: (1) Default resolution FHD 1920x1080 confirmed via canvas.width/height. (2) Default subtitle exactly '- Chitoos Media'. (3) AI Enhance auto-run populated title ('Gentle Star Glow') but left subtitle unchanged as '- Chitoos Media' — AI tagline intentionally ignored. (4) Stop button flow: state moved to 'finished' within 0.14s, download+preview appeared, no console errors, piano key click after modal close works (sampler volume restored). Backend pytest 18/18 passed in 56.9s.
rca of the issue: N/A — this iteration confirmed the fix works. Root cause of original bug: notes were pre-scheduled on Tone.js audio timeline; sampler.releaseAll() only stops currently-held notes, not future-scheduled triggerAttackRelease calls. Fix (setting sampler.volume.value = -Infinity before stop and restoring to 0 after 250ms) is correct and verified.
